data.markdown:
[Accelerators](https://www.techstars.com/accelerators)

# Techstars Chicago

Techstars Chicago, in partnership with Long Chicago, is an early stage accelerator & venture fund. We're long on the Midwest and intensely founder-focused. To our selected companies, we offer a large and committed investor + mentor base, dedicated office space in downtown Chicago for up to a year, and a program centered on building and fundraising. Our mission is to earn the right to be your most trusted advisor. Techstars Chicago is not industry or vertical focused - all ambitious founders are welcome to apply. If you're building something inevitable — especially if others don't see it yet — get in touch.

Chicago, United States

[Get in Touch](https://longchicago.com/)

2026 March

###### In Person Program

Aug 25th, 2025

Applications Open

Nov 19th, 2025

Final Deadline

Mar 9th, 2026

Accelerator Starts

Jun 2nd, 2026

Demo Day

[Inside an accelerator](https://www.techstars.com/accelerator-hub) [FAQ](https://www.techstars.com/faq#accelerators)

###### Steve Martin, Comedian and Actor
